title: Looking for monday.com specialist to join the Kick team :yellow_circle:

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Elena here, founder and chief at Kick Consulting, Silver monday.com Channel Partner

We’re growing and looking for experienced monday.com freelancers and consultants to support our expanding list of clients. As a Silver monday.com Channel Partner, we deliver customised solutions to businesses that are going from chaos to streamlined, scalable systems.

We’re after confident, capable professionals who can jump in and help with:

  • Client project scoping sessions and training
  • Workflow and solution design
  • Full monday.com implementations
  • Support
  • Bonus points if you have experience with Make.com or Zapier.

What we offer :

  • Flexible, remote work
  • Project-based hours to suit your schedule
  • Competitive rates
  • Access to certification pathways and real-world client work
  • A collaborative, knowledgeable team that’s committed to simplifying tech for our clients

We value people who are reliable, resourceful, and genuinely care about getting businesses humming with better systems.

Interested? Fill out this form and we’ll be in touch with next steps.

Want to see the kind of work we do? Check out kickconsulting.com.au.
